channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: gedoor/legado
item.description: Legado 3.0 Book Reader with powerful controls & full functions❤️阅读3.0, 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

item.title: 2dust/v2rayNG
item.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

item.title: aws/aws-toolkit-jetbrains
item.description: AWS Toolkit for JetBrains - a plugin for interacting with AWS from JetBrains IDEs

item.title: MatsuriDayo/NekoBoxForAndroid
item.description: NekoBox for Android / sing-box / universal proxy toolchain for Android

item.title: RikkaApps/Shizuku
item.description: Using system APIs directly with adb/root privileges from normal apps through a Java process started with app_process.

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 電視網絡視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: maxrave-dev/SimpMusic
item.description: A simple music app using YouTube Music for backend

item.title: androidx/androidx
item.description: Development environment for Android Jetpack extension libraries under the androidx namespace. Synchronized with Android Jetpack's primary development branch on AOSP.

item.title: android/platform-samples
item.description: A collection of samples of different Android OS platform APIs.

item.title: DerGoogler/MMRL
item.description: MMRL is an Android app that helps manage your own modules repository.

item.title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
item.description: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

item.title: NeoApplications/Neo-Store
item.description: An F-Droid client with modern UI and an arsenal of extra features.
